mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, sort, visible, created_at, updated_at FROM bi_publish_group ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, description, sort, visible, created_at, updated_at FROM bi_publish_group WHERE visible = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bi_publish_group WHERE name = #{name} AND (#{excludeId} IS NULL OR id <> #{excludeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_publish_group (name, description, sort, visible) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{visible})
